what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment of type images, mapping an attachment id to a target image URI in the design-assets channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares attachment_type: images and channel: design-assets.
The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/image (14)1.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
The file id is att-5e566b9e and the filename matches that id.
standouts: The target URI contains literal spaces and parentheses: 'image (14)1'.
It uses a custom image:// scheme rather than a standard file or HTTP URL.
It is a metadata-only stub, not the image asset itself.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References assets by a channel-scoped URI.
concerns: The target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may break naive parsers or link resolution.
No MIME type, dimensions, alt text, or file extension are recorded.
No message, thread, or author context is provided for the attachment.
notes: A minimal metadata stub that links attachment id att-5e566b9e to an image asset in the design-assets channel via an image:// URI.
questions: Which message or thread is this attachment associated with?
What does the filename 'image (14)1' represent and what is its format?
How is the image:// scheme resolved to an actual file or resource?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose is to record an image attachment in a channel ledger, and that is exactly what its metadata does.
intention_signals: Track an image attachment in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced by id and located through a channel-scoped image URI.
novelty: The use of an image:// scheme and a target path containing spaces and parentheses in otherwise conventional YAML attachment metadata.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, timestamped metadata stub that maps an attachment id to an image asset URI within the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment metadata file named att-5e566b9e.md that records an image attachment in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (14)1.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image asset as an attachment in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced by id.
